overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a lush tropical rainforest during a light rain shower. The journey transitions from a dense jungle path with red flowering undergrowth to an open coastal area featuring large tribal wooden structures and totems, culminating in crossing an elevated wooden bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tropical jungle path with red flowering undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow jungle path surrounded by dense vegetation and palm trees

entered.detail: tall tropical palm trees forming a dense canopy overhead
thick tree trunks with textured bark flanking the path
vibrant red flowering vegetation lining the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the jungle undergrowth

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense tropical rainforest with tall palm trees creating a partial canopy overhead. The character walks along a narrow dirt path surrounded by lush green vegetation and vibrant red flowering bushes on the right, with rain falling gently through the diffused light.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal forest edge approaching tribal settlement

events.description: exiting dense jungle canopy into open coastal area with bright sky visible
large spiky tribal totem structure becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path as the forest opens up to reveal coastal tribal structures

notable_agents.action: tribal figures standing near the base of the large totem structure

entered.detail: massive tribal totem with spiked wooden projections and colorful decorations
primitive wooden buildings and scaffolding in the coastal settlement
large rocky outcrops and cliffs visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from enclosed jungle to an open coastal area with full sky visibility and brighter lighting. The path continues through sparser vegetation toward a tribal settlement featuring a prominent spiked totem. Tribal figures can be seen standing near the structures in the distance as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden tribal bridge with decorative carvings

events.description: ascending from dirt path onto elevated wooden tribal bridge structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs and walking across the elevated tribal bridge with carved railings

notable_agents.action: tribal member standing guard on the bridge ahead

entered.detail: elevated walkway constructed from wooden planks and logs
tribal carvings and colorful decorations on the bridge railings
suspension bridge made of ropes and wooden planks spanning the gap

segments.scene_description: The character ascends from the dirt path onto an elevated wooden bridge adorned with tribal carvings and colorful decorations. The bridge leads deeper into the settlement with rope bridges visible ahead, while tribal members can be seen standing guard along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a rainy tropical rainforest into an open, vibrant tribal coastal settlement. It begins on a narrow dirt path beneath a partial canopy of tall palm trees, where gentle rain falls over lush green vegetation and vibrant red flowering bushes. As the character moves forward, the enclosed jungle opens into a bright coastal area with full sky visibility, shifting the path toward a settlement marked by a prominent spiked totem and distant tribal figures. The scene then ascends from the dirt ground onto an elevated wooden bridge adorned with colorful decorations and tribal carvings. Finally, the camera follows the path deeper into the village, passing tribal guards and approaching a network of rope bridges.
